Runtime copies:
- third_party/kenney-sketch-desert/selected-originals/<name>
  -> assets/art/map_props/kenney_sketch_desert/<name>

The PNG bytes are unchanged. Visual integration is performed at runtime with
reduced saturation/opacity, a warm tint, and a shared down-right shadow.
Kenney logos and preview/sample images are not included or displayed.
